title: 有馬記念の後に・好敵手、相成り

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: You were back to your old self out there!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That was the strength I've yearned to best for so
long.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I'm glad to have you as a rival.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Please keep on running. With me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki and Oguri Cap's smiling faces
usher the Arima Kinen to a cheery close.
